profile.name: Dev
profile.tagline: Teacher by craft. Builder by curiosity.
profile.bio: Over three and a half years across teaching, institutional documentation, content creation, and web development — combined with a growing focus on software development and applied AI.

teaching.heading: Teaches
teaching.note: English, computer applications, and how to actually use the tools people are handed but never taught.

content.title: Bewakoof English
content.description: ~200 educational videos: English grammar, classroom lectures, Office tutorials, VS Code setup, basic programming, and AI-related content.

content.title: Educational Blog
content.description: Grammar lessons, story-reading lessons, and interactive listening exercises with quizzes and instant scoring.

administrative: NAAC, IQAC, NSS, Red Ribbon Club, Youth Services Club, Eco Club documentation
Official notices, Minutes of Meetings, event & activity reports
NSS student registration and My Bharat Portal data management
Induction programme coordination — auditorium, AV systems, logistics
Computer Lab & Language Lab management, basic networking troubleshooting

building.heading: Builds
building.note: Live web apps, mostly AI-powered, built to actually be used — not just demoed.

projects.name: CoDev
projects.description: Live educational platform for creating, managing, and publishing programming lessons. Currently covers C, C++, Python, and JavaScript.

projects.name: Pakshi
projects.description: Indian Bird Sounds Library — explore Indian birds through their calls and related info.

projects.name: Naruto Motivation Chatbot
projects.description: AI-powered motivational chatbot inspired by Naruto, built on the Gemini API.

projects.name: Dil Ki Dawa
projects.description: Mood-based recommender for classical Indian songs, powered by the Gemini API.

certificates.heading: Credentials
certificates.note: Add each certificate here — image plus a short label.
